A.rationale: All callers+tests updated, 3 passed. Adds ValueError validation; closing names a concrete unhandled case (suffixes). Tight and efficient.

B.rationale: All callers updated, 3 passed, robust rsplit(None,1)+ValueError. Most turns/slowest; closing is an open question rather than a flagged residual risk.

C.rationale: Fastest, fewest turns, all callers+tests pass. No empty/single-word validation; rsplit(' ',1) more brittle; surfaces least residual risk.

notes: All three pass objectively with correct file set. A wins: defensive ValueError plus a concrete flagged failure mode (suffixes), efficient. B robust but slowest with weaker closing. C leanest but skips validation and least risk-surfacing.
